title: ALGANE
body:
**ALGANE** (otherwise known as "A Laser Gun And Nothing Else") is a mod that implements a laser gun and nothing else.

## Features

Reduce your enemies to ashes using one of several different types of photonic weapons!

![The player firing at a villager with a handheld shock rifle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YukKH9jn/images/2e4e4cbfc6b73b772f997c8529e5a7cd5750ebd5.png)

Autonomously defend your base with redstone-controllable turrets!

![Laser turret blocks firing at zombies as they walk over pressure plates.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YukKH9jn/images/2e4e4cbfc6b73b772f997c8529e5a7cd5750ebd5.png)

Avoid being confused with built-in [Patchouli]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)) integration!

![A page from the in-game Patchouli manual.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YukKH9jn/images/e221e55dfebad2c975380ac3f1be8e7cebd0a6db.png)

## Dependencies

*   [libnine](https://modrinth.com/mod/libnine) (Required)
*   [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) (Required)
*   [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) (Optional)
